title: Aitareya Brahmana: The Coronation of the King
description: Aitareya Brahmana — Brahmana or Aranyaka literature explaining the meaning of the Vedic rituals.
introduction: Aitareya Brahmana — Brahmana or Aranyaka literature explaining the meaning of the Vedic rituals.

translation.text: The king is Indra. The earth is his throne. The four directions are his attendants. He is anointed with the waters of all rivers. He is crowned with the symbols of the gods. He becomes one with Indra.
